category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Uganda) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Uganda Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Uganda requirements: UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and Certificate of Conformity, US/IEC 62133 cell safety, EMC, UCC radio type approval, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations. Uganda has no EU-style horizontal battery, RoHS, or outdoor-noise regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与乌干达要求对照：UNBS出口前一致性验证（PVoC）及合格证书、US/IEC 62133电芯安全、EMC、UCC无线电型号核准、UN 38.3运输及境内进口商义务。乌干达没有欧盟式的横向电池、RoHS或户外噪声法规。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與烏干達要求對照：UNBS出口前一致性驗證（PVoC）及合格證書、US/IEC 62133電芯安全、EMC、UCC無線電型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及境內進口商義務。烏干達沒有歐盟式的橫向電池、RoHS或戶外噪聲法規。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Uganda must obtain a UNBS Certificate of Conformity through the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme where the product is regulated, supported by IEC 62133 cell-safety testing, UCC type approval for any wireless functions, and a valid UN 38.3 transport report. A Chinese GB 31241 test report or CCC certificate is not, by itself, accepted as the Uganda Certificate of Conformity. Uganda has no equivalent of an EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS, or producer-responsibility/EPR regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国向乌干达出口锂电池及移动电源的出口商，须在产品属受监管范围时，通过出口前一致性验证（PVoC）计划取得UNBS合格证书，并以IEC 62133电芯安全测试、任何无线功能的UCC型号核准及有效的UN 38.3运输报告作为支持。中国GB 31241测试报告或CCC证书本身不被接受为乌干达合格证书。乌干达没有等同于欧盟式横向电池法规、RoHS或生产者责任/EPR制度的对应规定。
answer_first.zht: 中國向烏干達出口鋰電池及行動電源的出口商，須在產品屬受監管範圍時，通過出口前一致性驗證（PVoC）計劃取得UNBS合格證書，並以IEC 62133電芯安全測試、任何無線功能的UCC型號核准及有效的UN 38.3運輸報告作為支持。中國GB 31241測試報告或CCC證書本身不被接受為烏干達合格證書。烏干達沒有等同於歐盟式橫向電池法規、RoHS或生產者責任/EPR制度的對應規定。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator (UNBS, UCC), standards body (IEC, UNECE), or primary legal source preferred.
